title: Review lint for decomp source edits
description: Scan proposed source text or files for high-risk decomp review anti-patterns ported from the Melee harness hooks.
status_message: Native API v1: review lint scans text/files directly and mirrors useful harness hook checks.
limitations: The scan is conservative and lexical; findings should prompt source review rather than automatic rejection in isolation.
Inline-helper pointer-variable checks work best on complete C function text, not small snippets.
This suite complements, but does not replace, project review lint and local regression validation.

usage.agent_guidance: Use as part of attempt evaluation or source review feedback. It is a guardrail for accepting an attempt, not a command that must run after every edit.
